# CONSUMER_SOULSEED_TO_PAID_MINDSETS_V1

## Purpose

Move from architecture maturity toward launch.

This lane proves the first consumer launch spine:

SoulSeed entry
-> consumer lane
-> AI MindSet selection
-> PAID relationship
-> PAI-SAFE activation intent
-> FundTrackerAI truth requirement
-> setup proof packet
-> receiver validation
-> live activation record
-> TS proof reference

## Initial Consumer AI MindSets

- LawAidAI
- TravelFlowAI

## Launch Law

The feature leads.
The platform supports.
The payment trust teaches.
The dashboard retains.
The brand compounds.

## Boundaries

- No live payment rails
- No wallet
- No processor
- No receiver financial authority
- FundTrackerAI remains financial truth authority
- PAID is dashboard/home relationship inside iAscendAi
- SoulSeed is access/planting mechanism
- AI MindSets are specialty packages
- UI is not truth
- Display is not authority
